The '''''Astrogator''-class probe ship''' was a survey ship used by a number of exploratory and scientific organizations.

==Characteristics==
At 35 meters in length, ''Astrogator''-class starships were flat-hulled and covered in sensor receptors. Three crewmembers would perform all the command and sensor maintenance functions. These ships were also surreptitiously called "[[Fish/Legends|flatfish]]," due to the ship's thin, wide profile. The underbelly was studded with sensors, scanners, antennae, and transceivers.

{{Ship-stub}}
